Join

University of Sheffield

Sheffield Triathlon

Swim. Bike. Run. Belong.

A student-led triathlon club for complete beginners, social athletes and experienced racers.

Join Today View Training

About

Triathlon sounds intense. Joining us does not have to be.

Triathlon is three sports back to back — swim, bike and run — but you do not need to arrive as a triathlete. Sheffield Triathlon welcomes complete beginners, people from single-sport backgrounds, social members and experienced racers. The club trains across swimming, cycling and running, with a strong student community and routes that make the most of Sheffield and the Peak District.

Club at a Glance

Train, race and belong.

6 Weekly Sessions
40+ Races
BUCS Competitive Team

Club Life

More than just training.

The club should feel welcoming, active and social from the first visit.

Ready to give triathlon a go?

S Sheffield Triathlon Swim. Bike. Run. Belong.

Swim, bike and run with Sheffield Triathlon. Training, racing and socials for complete beginners and experienced athletes.

A student-led University of Sheffield triathlon club connected to Sport Sheffield.
